display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page; gold-violet clip gradient on the payoff word.

label.purpose: The signature face: every eyebrow, pill, badge, nav item, caption. Mono, wide-tracked, uppercase.

shadows.name: floating-art
shadows.purpose: Reserved for elements that genuinely float: hero card and boss-stack frame.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Mobile nav sheet and nav sub-menus.

shadows.name: selection-ring
shadows.purpose: Active/focused zone chip; a state indicator, not elevation.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default transition for hover/active state changes on chips, tabs, links.

motion.name: boss-expand
motion.purpose: The signature boss-stack slice expansion on hover (desktop only).

components.name: Primary Button (Violet)
components.description: Main explore/see action; violet gradient with dark ink.
components.css: .ds-btn-violet { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #b98cff, #8a5cf0); color: #14101f; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-violet:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); color: #14101f; } .ds-btn-violet:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

components.name: Gold CTA
components.description: The single strongest closing CTA per page; used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; padding: 16px 30px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0c46a, #c9a24b); color: #14101f; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); color: #14101f; } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary/fallback action; ghost with violet border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; padding: 14px 22px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(185,140,255,0.28); color: #cbb0ff; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(185,140,255,0.55); color: #ece8f5; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

components.name: Filter Tab
components.description: Section filter tab with count; active state fills violet.
components.css: .ds-tab { cursor: pointer; padding: 9px 16px; border-radius: 9px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; background: #191225; color: #a79bc0; border: 1px solid rgba(185,140,255,0.18); transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #ece8f5; } .ds-tab .ds-tab-count { opacity: 0.55; font-size: 11px; } .ds-tab-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #b98cff, #8a5cf0); color: #14101f; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

components.name: Zone Chip
components.description: Activation-zone filter chip, colored per zone; selected adds a white ring.
components.html: HANDDECKGYFIELD
components.css: .ds-zone { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; opacity: 0.72; transition: opacity 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-zone:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-zone-active { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.75); } .ds-zone-hand { color: #e0c46a; border: 1px solid #e0c46a55; } .ds-zone-deck { color: #b98cff; border: 1px solid #b98cff55; } .ds-zone-gy { color: #8f9bd0; border: 1px solid #8f9bd055; } .ds-zone-field { color: #7fd8c6; border: 1px solid #7fd8c655; }

components.name: Type Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; color: #a79bc0; border: 1px solid rgba(167,155,192,0.28); }

components.name: Card Row
components.description: Compendium unit: flat surface, hairline border, tonal art rail.
components.html:
刀CARD ART
Ritual Monster · Payoff

Mitsurugi Ritual Monster

DARKReptile
components.css: .ds-card-row { background: #191225; border: 1px solid rgba(185,140,255,0.16); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 160px 1fr; } .ds-card-art { background: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, #1e1633, #1e1633 9px, #241b3d 9px, #241b3d 18px); border-right: 1px solid rgba(185,140,255,0.14); padding: 24px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-diamond { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid rgba(224,196,106,0.5); transform: rotate(45deg); } .ds-diamond > span { transform: rotate(-45deg); font-size: 20px; color: #e0c46a; } .ds-art-cap { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #7f74a0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-role { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #b98cff; } .ds-card-name { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 22px; color: #ece8f5; margin: 0; } .ds-badge { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; color: #a79bc0; border: 1px solid rgba(167,155,192,0.28); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sticky-header nav link; mono, dim at rest, violet-tint when active.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; background: rgba(20,16,31,0.72); padding: 8px; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: #a79bc0; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #cbb0ff; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(185,140,255,0.12); color: #cbb0ff; }

narrative.overview: A dark reference tome for a single Yu-Gi-Oh! deck: disciplined, legible, and quietly scholarly. Everything sits on a purple-black ground the color of a shrine at night, and meaning is carried by two accents that never trade jobs: gold is the payoff, violet is the interaction language. The page reads like an illuminated manuscript, dense with content but calm, gold catching the eye only where something actually matters. The system rejects the generic TCG wiki, official Konami styling, corporate SaaS clichés, and loud gamer/RGB. Restraint is the point: color is scarce so it can mean something, and one signature motion is allowed per page.
keyCharacteristics: Purple-black ground; color is scarce and therefore meaningful.
Two accents, strictly separated: gold = payoff, violet = interaction.
Near-flat surfaces built from tonal violet layering, not shadows.
The diamond motif at every scale.
Mono-uppercase labels as the signature texture.
One breakpoint (900px); one signature motion per page.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Gold and violet are never interchangeable. Gold means payoff/emphasis/stats; violet means interaction/links/eyebrows. If a color choice can't be justified by that split, it's wrong.

rules.name: The Purple-Gray Rule
rules.body: There is no neutral gray anywhere. Every 'gray' is a purple-leaning value off the text ramp, and every border is alpha-violet.

rules.name: The Scarce Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold appears only where something is a genuine reward or the single most important number on screen.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Every label, eyebrow, pill, badge, nav item, and caption is IBM Plex Mono, wide-tracked. Never set a label in the body or display face.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Eyebrows are mono, violet, prefixed // LABEL. Use them deliberately as page or key-section markers, never above every section. The numbered form // 01 · LABEL is reserved for content that is a true ordered sequence.

rules.name: The No-Em-Dash Rule
rules.body: No em-dashes anywhere in copy. Use colons or commas.

rules.name: The Flat-Codex Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and separated by tone and hairline borders. A drop shadow is earned only by something that genuinely floats.

dos: Do keep gold and violet in their lanes: gold = payoff/stats/emphasis, violet = interaction/links/eyebrows.
Do build depth from tonal surface steps (#191225 to #1e1633 to #241b3d) and alpha-violet hairline borders, not shadows.
Do set every label, pill, badge, nav item, and eyebrow in IBM Plex Mono, wide-tracked, usually uppercase.
Do reserve the big soft shadow (0 40px 80px -30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)) for elements that genuinely float.
Do use the diamond (45-degree rotated square) as the recurring motif at every scale.
Do keep body copy purple-leaning off the text ramp and comfortably readable against #14101f.
Do keep to one signature motion per page and give it room.
donts: Don't look like a generic TCG wiki: no dense table-dumps, no ad slots, no undifferentiated wall of card text.
Don't mimic official Konami styling; this fan guide has its own violet-black voice.
Don't drift into corporate SaaS clichés: no cream/navy landing pages, no hero-metric templates, no identical icon-card grids, no tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Don't go loud gamer/RGB: no neon, no harsh multi-stop gradients, no angular esports styling.
Don't introduce neutral gray text or gray borders anywhere; every gray is purple-leaning and every border is alpha-violet.
Don't spend gold on decoration; if it isn't marking a payoff or the single key number, it shouldn't be gold.
Don't use em-dashes in any copy; use colons or commas.
Don't put a shadow on a resting card, or a numbered 01 marker on a section that isn't a true sequence.
